gff <- readRDS\("genome/cache/gff_chr1_31.rds"\)

cat\("\\nSingle-transcript genes check:\\n"\)

mrna_per_gene <- table\(unlist\(mrna$Parent\)\)
cat\("Genes with 1 mRNA:", sum\(mrna_per_gene == 1\), "\\n"\)
cat\("Genes with >1 mRNA:", sum\(mrna_per_gene > 1\), "\\n"\)
')

Bash(Rscript - << 'EOF'
library\(GenomicRanges\)
library\(data.table\)

# Load the GFF cache
gff <- readRDS\("/mnt/data/alfredvar/rlopezt/repos/Deroceras-Leave/genome/cache/gff_chr1_31.rds"\)

# Extract genes, mRNAs, exons
genes <- gff[gff$type == "gene"]
mrnas <- gff[gff$type == "mRNA"]
exons <- gff[gff$type == "exon"]

# Map exons to genes via mRNA \(same logic as in build_expanded_regions\)
exon_parent <- unlist\(exons$Parent\)
mrna_parent <- unlist\(mrnas$Parent\)

# Use longest mRNA per gene \(canonical transcript\)
mrna_dt <- data.table\(
  mrna_id  = mrnas$ID,
  gene_id  = mrna_parent,
  mrna_len = width\(mrnas\)
\)
canonical <- mrna_dt[, .SD[which.max\(mrna_len\)], by = gene_id]

# Get exons for canonical transcripts only
canon_exons <- exons[exon_parent %in% canonical$mrna_id]
canon_parent <- exon_parent[exon_parent %in% canonical$mrna_id]

# Map exon → gene_id via mRNA
mrna_to_gene <- setNames\(canonical$gene_id, canonical$mrna_id\)
exon_gene <- mrna_to_gene[canon_parent]

# Order exons within each gene
exon_dt <- data.table\(
  chr = as.character\(seqnames\(canon_exons\)\),
  start = start\(canon_exons\),
  end = end\(canon_exons\),
  strand = as.character\(strand\(canon_exons\)\),
  gene_id = exon_gene,
  mrna_id = canon_parent
\)
exon_dt[, n_exons := .N, by = gene_id]

# Count genes by number of exons
gene_counts <- exon_dt[, .\(count = .N\), by = .\(n_exons, gene_id\)][, .\(n_genes = .N\), by = n_exons]
setorder\(gene_counts, n_exons\)

cat\("=== Gene counts by number of exons ===\\n"\)
cat\(sprintf\("1 exon:   %d genes\\n", gene_counts[n_exons == 1, n_genes]\)
cat\(sprintf\("2 exons:  %d genes\\n", gene_counts[n_exons == 2, n_genes]\)
cat\(sprintf\("3 exons:  %d genes\\n", gene_counts[n_exons == 3, n_genes]\)
cat\(sprintf\("3+ exons: %d genes\\n", gene_counts[n_exons >= 3, sum\(n_genes\)]\)

# Also show total
cat\(sprintf\("\\nTotal genes: %d\\n", gene_counts[, sum\(n_genes\)]\)
EOF)

Bash(Rscript - << 'EOF'
library\(GenomicRanges\)
library\(data.table\)

# Load the GFF cache
gff <- readRDS\("/mnt/data/alfredvar/rlopezt/repos/Deroceras-Leave/genome/cache/gff_chr1_31.rds"\)

# Extract genes, mRNAs, exons
genes <- gff[gff$type == "gene"]
mrnas <- gff[gff$type == "mRNA"]
exons <- gff[gff$type == "exon"]

# Map exons to genes via mRNA \(same logic as in build_expanded_regions\)
exon_parent <- unlist\(exons$Parent\)
mrna_parent <- unlist\(mrnas$Parent\)

# Use longest mRNA per gene \(canonical transcript\)
mrna_dt <- data.table\(
  mrna_id  = mrnas$ID,
  gene_id  = mrna_parent,
  mrna_len = width\(mrnas\)
\)
canonical <- mrna_dt[, .SD[which.max\(mrna_len\)], by = gene_id]

# Get exons for canonical transcripts only
canon_exons <- exons[exon_parent %in% canonical$mrna_id]
canon_parent <- exon_parent[exon_parent %in% canonical$mrna_id]

# Map exon → gene_id via mRNA
mrna_to_gene <- setNames\(canonical$gene_id, canonical$mrna_id\)
exon_gene <- mrna_to_gene[canon_parent]

# Order exons within each gene
exon_dt <- data.table\(
  chr = as.character\(seqnames\(canon_exons\)\),
  start = start\(canon_exons\),
  end = end\(canon_exons\),
  strand = as.character\(strand\(canon_exons\)\),
  gene_id = exon_gene,
  mrna_id = canon_parent
\)
exon_dt[, n_exons := .N, by = gene_id]

# Count genes by number of exons
gene_counts <- exon_dt[!duplicated\(gene_id\), .\(n_exons = n_exons\)]
gene_counts <- gene_counts[, .\(n_genes = .N\), by = n_exons]
setorder\(gene_counts, n_exons\)

cat\("=== Gene counts by number of exons ===\\n"\)
cat\(sprintf\("1 exon:   %d genes\\n", gene_counts[n_exons == 1, n_genes]\)\)
cat\(sprintf\("2 exons:  %d genes\\n", gene_counts[n_exons == 2, n_genes]\)\)
cat\(sprintf\("3 exons:  %d genes\\n", gene_counts[n_exons == 3, n_genes]\)\)
cat\(sprintf\("3+ exons: %d genes\\n", gene_counts[n_exons >= 3, sum\(n_genes\)]\)\)

# Also show total
cat\(sprintf\("\\nTotal genes: %d\\n", gene_counts[, sum\(n_genes\)]\)\)

# Print full table
cat\("\\nFull distribution:\\n"\)
print\(gene_counts\)
EOF)

Bash(Rscript - << 'EOF'
library\(GenomicRanges\)
library\(data.table\)

# Load the GFF cache
gff <- readRDS\("/mnt/data/alfredvar/rlopezt/repos/Deroceras-Leave/genome/cache/gff_chr1_31.rds"\)

# Count all genes
all_genes <- gff[gff$type == "gene"]
cat\(sprintf\("Total genes in GFF: %d\\n", length\(all_genes\)\)\)

# Count genes with mRNA
mrnas <- gff[gff$type == "mRNA"]
genes_with_mrna <- length\(unique\(unlist\(mrnas$Parent\)\)\)
cat\(sprintf\("Genes with mRNA: %d\\n", genes_with_mrna\)\)

# Count genes that would have exons after canonical selection
exons <- gff[gff$type == "exon"]
exon_parent <- unlist\(exons$Parent\)
mrna_parent <- unlist\(mrnas$Parent\)

mrna_dt <- data.table\(
  mrna_id  = mrnas$ID,
  gene_id  = mrna_parent,
  mrna_len = width\(mrnas\)
\)
canonical <- mrna_dt[, .SD[which.max\(mrna_len\)], by = gene_id]

canon_exons <- exons[exon_parent %in% canonical$mrna_id]
canon_parent <- exon_parent[exon_parent %in% canonical$mrna_id]

cat\(sprintf\("Genes with canonical mRNA and exons: %d\\n", length\(unique\(canon_parent[!is.na\(canon_parent\)]\)\)\)\)

# Now the key: look at intronless genes from the code and see if they match
mrna_to_gene <- setNames\(canonical$gene_id, canonical$mrna_id\)
exon_gene <- mrna_to_gene[canon_parent]

exon_dt <- data.table\(
  gene_id = exon_gene,
  mrna_id = canon_parent
\)
exon_dt[, n_exons := .N, by = gene_id]

intronless <- unique\(exon_dt[n_exons == 1]$gene_id\)
cat\(sprintf\("Single-exon \(intronless\) genes: %d\\n", length\(intronless\)\)\)
EOF)
